message: 🔴 Very Poor air quality expected in Anand Vihar (AQI 375). All residents should minimize outdoor exposure.
actions: Everyone should avoid prolonged outdoor activity
N95 masks essential when outdoors
Keep all windows and doors closed
Schools should consider indoor-only activities
Monitor for respiratory symptoms — seek medical help if needed
